channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Greek soccer player George Baldock found dead in Athens home; investigators rule out foul play
item.description: Reuters reported that police attempted to resuscitate George Baldock after his body was found at the home just outside of Athens, Greece.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens unaware of NFL policy on eye black messaging: 'Never seen it before'
item.description: Third-year Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens' eye black during last Sunday's game against the Cowboys featured a message that included profanity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rays say it may take 'weeks' to fully assess damage at Tropicana Field, after Milton struck region
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays said it may take weeks to fully assess how much damage was done to Tropicana Field, which saw its roof ripped to shreds by the force of Hurricane Milton as the deadly storm barreled across much of Florida. The team said no one was injured when the St.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
